finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:49; chapters/chapter_08.md:85; chapters/chapter_08.md:107; chapters/chapter_08.md:115; chapters/chapter_08.md:145; chapters/chapter_08.md:147; chapters/chapter_08.md:203; chapters/chapter_08.md:265
finding_results.notes: Marcus now names the west-dock grate and ladder as the actual route, keeps the service-hall mechanical door as a separate yellow-reader entrance, and Noor later identifies the cafeteria-side door as the other entrance before annotating it separately on the sketch.
Present-state clauses now stay in present tense while the explicit yesterday actions remain in past tense.
The chapter keeps one functional swallow at the vomiting beat and replaces the later repetitions with jaw-lock and gaze-drop markers so Marcus's withdrawal reads across multiple physical systems.
The opening smell description no longer uses 'sweet' for decomposition.
The opening now enters on smell and does not restate the prior chapter's death tally or HVAC-carrying phrasing.
Marcus's family references now use Jen and Lily to match the packet's cited chapter-11 canon; the continuity sheet does not specify those names.

Three lines revised. (1) Priya's line about Lena's authority (line 177): replaced the clean maxim with a false-start self-correction ('whether she ordered it, that is not') followed by a concrete witness anchor ('The one by the cooler. He did not look at anyone first'). Retains formal register, no contractions, but now sounds like a person choosing words under fear rather than delivering polished commentary. (2) Priya's line about guard staffing (line 195): broke the neat two-clause reversal by inserting a physical pause (pulling at her cuff), a qualifying 'maybe', and a trailing admission of uncertainty ('I do not know which'). The observation still lands but can no longer be lifted as a standalone thesis. (3) Marcus's sprint-observation (line 257): replaced the composed four-clause summary with withdrawal-fragmented speech that routes through the family message ('She's asking if I'm eating'), a false start ('And outside that's—'), physical interruption (pressing heel of hand against eye), and a bitter projected detail ('Your dad's on a job, he doesn't call') instead of clean summary. All three revised lines still communicate the same information. None can be extracted as balanced thesis sentences without loss of their scene-specific anchors, hesitations, and qualifications.

Kept the family-message dissonance on the page, isolated the CLOSE/ARCHIVE beat, and replaced the soothing tomato-status final line with Noor's live tactical recognition that the only path to the mechanical plant still runs through Lena.

pass_summaries.summary: Clarified the chapter's access geography by making Marcus's sketch the west-dock grate route and Noor's later sightline the separate service-hall door, while also removing the opening seam repetition, correcting tense drift, varying withdrawal somatics, and aligning Marcus's family names to the packet's later canon.

Single finding addressed across three dialogue sites. Priya's two lines in the Noor-Priya exchange were roughened with self-correction, concrete scene-witness detail, and trailing qualification while preserving her formal, low-contraction idiolect. Marcus's outside-world observation was fragmented through family-message callback, false start, physical interruption, and a bitter projected detail that replaces the neat thesis with withdrawal-specific spoken texture. No continuity, structural, or voice-signature changes elsewhere in the chapter.

Reworked the chapter close so it no longer exits on a calming garden update; it now preserves the relay-message contrast and ends on the unresolved in-building pressure of Lena controlling access to the sublevel mechanical plant.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=8, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
